# advisor-hierarchy

> A Claude Code skill that implements a 3-tier agent hierarchy (Master + Executor + Apex Advisor). Enables complex multi-step tasks to be decomposed, dispatched in parallel waves, and synthesized with expert review.

## Install

```bash
npx ah
```

## Stack

- Node.js (CommonJS), no build step
- Three Markdown skill files are the core product
